name: 03_Text_Classification_NaiveBayes_20Newsgroups_ML
query: Tafadhali tekeleza kisanidi cha Naive Bayes kwa seti ya data ya 20 Newsgroups na uhifadhi katika faili inayoitwa `src/model.py`. Seti ya data inapaswa kupakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Programu inapaswa kushughulikia uchakataji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha, alama za uakifishaji, na herufi maalum. Onyesha uboreshaji wa kisanidi chako kwa kutengeneza mawingu ya maneno kabla na baada ya kufundisha kisanidi chako na kuyahifadhi kama `results/figures/wordcloud_before.png` na `results/figures/wordcloud_after.png`. Tafadhali hesabu na ujumuisha vipengele vya TF-IDF wakati wa kupakia data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mwishowe, chapisha ripoti ya utendaji (ikiwa ni pamoja na usahihi, urejeshaji, na alama ya F1) na uhifadhi kama `results/metrics/performance.txt`. Mfano unapaswa kuwa rahisi kuelewa, na ripoti ya mwisho inapaswa kuandaliwa kwa uwazi kwa urahisi wa mapitio.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "20 Newsgroups" inatumika katika `src/data_loader.py`.

Uchakataji wa data unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha, alama za uakifishaji, na herufi maalum. Mawingu ya maneno yanaonyeshwa kabla na baada ya kufundisha kisanidi, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/wordcloud_before.png` na `results/figures/wordcloud_after.png`.
Vipengele vya "TF-IDF" vinatumika wakati wa kupakia data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Ripoti ya utendaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na "usahihi," "urejeshaji," na "alama ya F1," inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/performance.txt`.

preferences.criteria: Ripoti ya mwisho inapaswa kuandaliwa kwa uwazi kwa urahisi wa mapitio.

hint: In the query, there is a missing word "be" after the word "should" in "The dataset should loaded in `src/data_loader.py`".

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "20 Newsgroups" inatumika katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually implement loading of the "20 Newsgroups" dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation that merely lists the requirement as a string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS`. The `load_dataset()` function returns a dummy dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real data loading logic (e.g., no `sklearn.datasets.fetch_20newsgroups` or equivalent call). This is a minimal semantic placeholder, not a functional implementation of the requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Uchakataji wa data unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha, alama za uakifishaji, na herufi maalum. Mawingu ya maneno yanaonyeshwa kabla na baada ya kufundisha kisanidi, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/wordcloud_before.png` na `results/figures/wordcloud_after.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The project structure confirms that both `results/figures/wordcloud_before.png` and `results/figures/wordcloud_after.png` files exist in the expected locations. The error messages encountered are API/image format errors during the evaluation process (the system tried to read PNG files as JPEG), not errors during file creation — the files themselves were successfully generated and saved. The presence of both wordcloud files in the correct directory (`results/figures/`) indicates that data preprocessing (including stopword removal, punctuation, and special character removal) was performed, and word clouds were created and saved both before and after training the classifier, as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Vipengele vya "TF-IDF" vinatumika wakati wa kupakia data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement TF-IDF features at all. The file is a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder that only contains:
- A list of requirement criteria strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`) that *mention* "TF-IDF" as text
- A `load_dataset()` function that returns a dummy dictionary with no actual data loading
- A `build_transforms()` function returning placeholder strings

There is no actual TF-IDF implementation (e.g., no `TfidfVectorizer` from scikit-learn, no `fetch_20newsgroups` call, no real feature extraction). The word "TF-IDF" appears only as a string in a metadata list, not as functional code.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual implementation of a Naive Bayes classifier. Instead, it only contains metadata strings listing the requirement criteria and keywords, along with a placeholder `build_model()` function that returns a string `"model placeholder"`. There is no actual Naive Bayes algorithm, no use of libraries like `sklearn.naive_bayes`, and no real model training or prediction logic. The file appears to be a stub created to superficially reference the requirement without fulfilling it.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya utendaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na "usahihi," "urejeshaji," na "alama ya F1," inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/performance.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/performance.txt` contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of actual performance metrics. There is no evidence of accuracy, recall, or F1 score being computed and saved. The trajectory analysis also confirms that no steps related to writing or saving meaningful performance data to this file were found.
